# Generated by tools/m10_fourth_century.py --write; AD 300-399 disasters.

# Crete Earthquake and Tsunami; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9
antq_m10_fourth_crete_earthquake = {
	monthly_spawn_chance = monthly_spawn_chance_unique
	can_start = {
		tag = XAA
		current_date >= 365.1.1
		current_date < 366.1.1
		has_any_active_disaster = no
	}
	can_end = {
		current_date >= 366.1.1
	}
	on_start = {
		trigger_event_non_silently = antq_m10_fourth.4005
	}
}
